---
species: "Carcinus maenas"
accepted_code: "CAMA"
alternate_codes: ["CAMS"]
diminutive: "CAMAJ"
alternate_diminutives: ["", ""]
common_name: "Green crab"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
date: ""
date-format: " "
description: "Dark and mottled shell"
image: '/header_images/carcinus_maenas.jpg'
categories:
  - crustaceans
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_videos
    - marsh_quads
    - marsh_pitfall
    - marsh_traps
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
  - marsh
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 107381
---

![](/header_images/carcinus_maenas.jpg)

**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 5 teeth on anterior margin of carapace, narrower than cancer crabs.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=107381)**
